Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Runtal North America, Inc.'s motion for determination of good faith of its settlement with plaintiff Marelich Mechanical Co., Inc. is granted. Runtal has shown that its settlement is within the Tech-Bilt ballpark and there is no indication that Marelich and Runtal have entered into the settlement in bad faith or with a purpose to harm defendant Nazzaro and Associates. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
